svg.text: 288-px HD107S display (2 arms × 2 segments × 72 px) · 480 RPM · 288×144 virtual canvas · 1-wire flywheel sync
Pin map from hardware/pov_segmented.h · dma_led.h (LPSPI4) · Phantasm.ino · pov_segment_map.h — LOGIC CARD + off-board LED power injection
Board Rev A · sources: hardware/phantasm/phantasm.kicad_sch · hardware/phantasm/gen/board.py · docs/phantasm_pcb_spec.md
ROTATING ASSEMBLY (all 4 boards + strips co-rotate on the arm)
float = internal pull-UP (HIGH). No pull-down here —
it would invert the ID decode (read_id, §pov_segmented).
input end ◀── DI / CI / 5V / GND DO / CO (open) ──▶ end
float = internal pull-UP (HIGH). No pull-down here —
it would invert the ID decode (read_id, §pov_segmented).
input end ◀── DI / CI / 5V / GND DO / CO (open) ──▶ end
float = internal pull-UP (HIGH). No pull-down here —
it would invert the ID decode (read_id, §pov_segmented).
input end ◀── DI / CI / 5V / GND DO / CO (open) ──▶ end
float = internal pull-UP (HIGH). No pull-down here —
it would invert the ID decode (read_id, §pov_segmented).
input end ◀── DI / CI / 5V / GND DO / CO (open) ──▶ end
+5 V — HEAVY run: PSU → slip ring → busbar → each strip 5V (injection); LIGHT tap → each card VIN
GND — heavy LED return + quiet logic ground; card SIG_GND ties strip GND at the strip (load-end star)
SYNC bus — buffered 5 V push-pull; ONE pin (pin 3): drive 74AHCT125 @5V (gated) / receive R-divider
SPI MOSI — pin 11 (LED DATA / DI), via 74AHCT125 @5V (U1, SOIC-14) + ~33 Ω series term
SPI SCK — pin 13 (LED CLOCK / CI), via U1 + ~33 Ω series term (short line)
Hardware-ID straps — pins 21/22 INPUT_PULLUP; ground a pin to set its bit
• Identical board ×4; ID strap (Phantasm.ino) picks role: 00→seg0 master, 21→seg1,
22→seg2, 21+22→seg3. MASTER_EN = Teensy pin 5 (LOW on seg-0) gates SYNC-OUT.
• ONE sync pin (pin 3, frees pin 4): DRIVE via U1 74AHCT125 (SOIC-14) @5V
(3.3→5, same '125 as DATA/CLK; its SYNC-OUT channel /OE gated by pin5=MASTER_EN), and
RECEIVE via R1 10k / R2 15k divider (3.0 V nominal) onto the same pin; both resistors are 0603 SMD.
AHCT supplies the 3.3→5 V up-shift only. Master drives + ignores its own echo.
• Floating-pin discipline: 10k pull-down on the sync bus; the divider R2 holds pin 3 defined
(no separate pull-down). ID straps EXCEPTED — internal pull-UPs (float=HIGH); a pull-down
there inverts the ID map. Spare '125 inputs → GND.
• LED POWER OFF-CARD: heavy 5V/GND busbar → strip injection (1000µF bulk THERE). Cards carry ~0.15A logic only.
• Card→strip = DATA/CLK + SIG_GND (load-end ground star). +5 V & GND cross slip ring (2 runs); SYNC+SPI on-rotor.
SYNC LINE CONDITIONING — detail (SOIC-14 + 0603 SMD · ONE sync pin (pin 3): drive via 74AHCT125 @5V / receive via R-divider · /OE = pin5 MASTER_EN)
OUT — 74AHCT125 @5V (SOIC-14): in-spec 3.3→5 up-shift (DATA, CLK, SYNC-OUT share this '125)
drives /OE of the SYNC-OUT channel — only seg-0 enables it. Per-channel /OE on the
'125 keeps DATA/CLK always-on. (Alts: NAND(ID0,ID1) gate, or a master jumper to GND.)
IN — 0603 SMD RESISTOR DIVIDER: 5 V bus → R1/R2 → 3.0 V nominal into pin 3 (R2 = pull-down)
ONE sync pin: pin 3 is drive (via U1) AND receive (via divider); master ignores its own echo, pin 4 free
TTL input reads 3.3 V HIGH, drives clean 5 V.
In-spec 3.3→5; DATA, CLK, SYNC-OUT share it.
AHCT output swings to ~5 V; pin 3 is not
5 V tolerant, so receive through R1/R2.
and 3.15 V from a 5.25 V rail. C_SYNC 220pF
filters the divider node; R2 is the pull-down.
ONE SYNC PIN (pin 3); role by strap:
(divider) share pin 3 — master never reads its
POWER INJECTION — detail (per strip · LED power OFF-CARD; spec §2.3)
from SLIP RING / busbar (16–18 AWG or busbar, not 8451)
• LED power is OFF-CARD: heavy 5 V/GND from the slip-ring busbar straight to each strip.
• Conductor: 16–18 AWG wire or busbar — NOT the 22 AWG Belden 8451 sync pair.
• Current splits: 4.3 A/strip · ~8.6 A/arm · 17 A only at the hub / slip ring.
• 1000µF bulk sits AT the injection point (where the 4.3 A transient is sourced).
• SIG_GND (card J2.3) ties strip GND at the strip = ground star; the 4.3 A IR-drop
then stays upstream of the data reference (R-SI-2). Card→strip = DI/CI + SIG_GND only.
• Never bond logic GND to the heavy power-GND at the card end. Slip ring rated ≥17 A.
